refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design and verification of each critical step impacting cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-FR contributes to meeting the overall CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic system and bucket control for load operation
Implement efficient path planning and vehicle speed control for travel
Automate dump mechanism timing and positioning
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic system and bucket control for load operation

potential_sources: Load operation DP impacts travel start timing
Travel DP depends on load completion signal
coupling_check.notes: Coupling between load and travel DPs is managed via clear interface signals; design parameters are modularized to minimize cross-domain interference.

assumptions_risks: Assumes hydraulic system can be optimized without compromising safety
Risk that load operation improvements may increase system complexity
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating travel and dump DPs in next decomposition level to better manage interdependencies.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for load operation including hydraulic actuators and bucket control systems

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load operation status and cycle time metrics to NGHE Solution for monitoring

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation modules to initiate load operation

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination, limited direct control of load operation
Primary containment of load operation DP; physical actuators and controls reside here
Provides remote control input but does not contain load operation logic
Monitors safety but does not implement load operation

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Load operation DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership of physical actuation.
containment_risks: Potential integration complexity with Teleoperation commands
Risk of insufficient interface definition causing delays or errors
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define interface protocols explicitly between Vehicle and Teleoperation to reduce integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement into manageable sub-functions; selected DP logically addresses a key sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if load operation logic is duplicated outside Vehicle module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment score and low diffusion, supporting good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle time metrics and monitoring telemetry from Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of load operation DP to Vehicle IM with defined interfaces supports traceability.

recommended_revisions: Expand decomposition to include travel and dump operations in next level
Clarify interface protocols between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

decision.justification: The current level decomposition and assignments are sound but incomplete; further decomposition of travel and dump sub-FRs is needed to fully cover the cycle time KPI.

revise.why: To decompose remaining sub-functions for comprehensive coverage of the cycle time KPI.

assumptions: Hydraulic system optimization is feasible within safety constraints
Interfaces between Vehicle and Teleoperation can be clearly defined
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Potential complexity increase from load operation optimization
evidence_needed: Performance data on load operation cycle time improvements
Interface specification documents between Vehicle and Teleoperation
